steps.title: Separate the two mineral examples
steps.content: The thought about painite is complete once painite is classified as transparent. The next idea describes trona, introduced by the phrase allowing only some light to pass through. A full sentence boundary keeps the two mineral examples clear.

steps.title: Reject faulty attachments
steps.content: Choice A creates a fused phrase with no punctuation. Choice B incorrectly links transparent and allowing, making the trona description attach to painite. Choice C uses only a comma, which blurs the boundary between the two examples. The answer is D.
